name: Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef top round steak, trimmed of fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into thin slices across the grain.
2. Place the beef in a 3 1/2 or 4 quart electric slow cooker.
3. Add the mushrooms, scallions, onion, thyme, sherry, broth, dry mustard, and garlic powder to the slow cooker.
4. Mix well.
5. Cover and cook on the low heat setting for about 8 hours, stirring once if possible, until the beef is tender.
6. Increase the heat setting to high.
7. In a separate bowl, mix together the sour cream and flour until thoroughly blended.
8. Stir in a little of the hot liquid from the slow cooker into the sour cream mixture.
9. Stir the sour cream mixture into the slow cooker, mixing well.
10. Cover and cook on high for 30 to 40 minutes, or until thickened slightly.
